description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, featuring large open terraces and expansive green rooftop areas. The structure is primarily composed of concrete with glass window panels, and includes a prominent front-facing pool and a set of steps leading up to the main entrance. The building is surrounded by low boundary walls and has a mix of open and enclosed spaces, with a large lawn area adjacent to the main living quarters. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor-indoor integration. The use of green roofs and water features suggests an emphasis on modern, eco-friendly living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed concrete bungalow with large terraces, green roofs, a front pool, and asymmetrical glass windows. The design is minimalist and emphasizes open, airy spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steps, pool, and large terrace with green rooftop.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, boundary walls, and secondary green space.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the expansive lawn, glass windows, and the main building volume.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, pool, and the integration of outdoor and indoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
